raw.message: Colorful Puzzle: A Creative Challenge Awaits!

hook.summary: A creator introduces a testimonial from another player about the game.
hook.visual_action: A woman speaks into a lapel microphone with a game screen overlay in the top right corner.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Just listen to what she's about to say. I play Drop Away when I'm waiting in line...

scene_flow: A creator introduces the game by telling the audience to listen to another player's experience.
A second creator shows herself playing the game in various locations like a park bench and a bathroom.
The player explains the game's strategic and calming nature while showing gameplay footage.
The player demonstrates a satisfying move where blocks fall into place and encourages the viewer to download.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying, strategic puzzle games to pass time during daily routines.
